description: Fix sidebar to display items vertically with proper dark theme styling, fixed left position, collapsible/pinnable behavior, and content area shifting right when sidebar is open.
steps: Review and fix CSS for sidebar to ensure vertical item layout is robust and matches page dark theme
Ensure sidebar is fixed on the left with proper spacing between items
Verify collapsible and pinnable functionality works correctly
Ensure content area shifts right when sidebar is open
Set dark theme as default to match the page pattern
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar items are stacked vertically (one per line)
Sidebar has clean dark background matching the page theme
Sidebar is fixed on the left side
Content area shifts right when sidebar is open
verification: Check CSS has flex-direction: column on sidebar nav
Verify dark theme is applied by default
Verify sidebar position is fixed left
Verify items have proper padding and gap
